description_long: This is a small urban parklet featuring a wooden bench with a backrest, set on a raised octagonal platform. The platform is divided into two halves: one side is covered with green grass, while the other is paved with light-colored cobblestones. The bench is constructed from horizontal wooden slats supported by sturdy metal legs and frame. Adjacent to the bench, on the grassy side, stands a green rectangular trash bin with a slanted top and a front opening. The entire setup is bordered by a low, gray concrete curb, giving it a defined and contained appearance suitable for public outdoor spaces.
description: A wooden bench with a backrest and metal supports sits on a split grass-and-cobblestone octagonal platform, accompanied by a green trash bin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full bench, the green trash bin to the right, and the split grass and cobblestone surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the bench and trash bin, with the platform's split surface visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bench, showing the backrest slats and the trash bin in front, with the grass side more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the bench from the other end and the trash bin's side profile, with the cobblestone surface in the foreground.
